violations.description: Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Plates in the kitchen are not inverted.

Handling of clean equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not handled in a manner to prevent contamination of food-contact surface. -Silverware should be laying the same direction in the holder.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Items dated past the ten day mark on the top shelf in the walk in cooler had to be discarded.
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
